# Tom Sesler — Product Designer

> Product designer building digital experiences. Research-driven UX, interface design, and live shipped products.

## About

Tom Sesler is a product designer based in Erie, PA. He designs and builds digital products end-to-end — from ethnographic field research and UX strategy through interactive prototypes to live, shipped software. His portfolio at straydesign.co showcases case studies, shipped products, and design process work.

## Skills & Expertise

- Product Design (end-to-end)
- UX Research (ethnographic, heuristic evaluation, usability testing)
- UX/UI Design (Figma, prototyping, design systems)
- Frontend Development (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- Design Strategy & Systems Thinking

## Key Projects

### MIDDLEMAN — Merchandising System
Bloomberg Terminal-inspired mobile app for beer merchandisers. Real-time POS data, auto-orders, shrinkage detection. Live prototype with custom design system.

### FirstDay.Life
AI-powered goal tracker with iterative weekly sprints. Designed, built, and shipped as a live product — covering design, engineering, and AI planning.

### DoorDash Dasher App UX Critique
Ethnographic UX research across 1,000+ deliveries with five redesign proposals. Heuristic evaluation and redesign concepts.

## Education

University of New Hampshire

## Services

- Product Design — End-to-end product design from research through shipped interfaces
- UX Research & Design — User experience research, prototyping, and interface design
- Web Development — Modern web applications built with React, Next.js, and TypeScript

## Contact

- Email: tom@straydesign.co
- Website: https://straydesign.co

- https://straywebdesign.co — Stray Web Design, Tom's web design agency building enterprise-grade websites for small businesses
- https://tomsesler.com — Tom Sesler's personal brand page
- https://firstday.life — FirstDay, AI-powered goal achievement platform (designed and built by Tom)

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage with project showcase
- /about — Background, reading list, design philosophy
- /resume — Professional resume
- /middleman — MIDDLEMAN merchandising system case study
- /dayone — FirstDay.Life case study
